directions:
Please follow specific daily feeding instructions included on packaging. Feeding Adult Cats During Gestation and Lactation: Provide increasing amounts of food during the second half of gestation, up to twice as much as the normal intake.  During lactation, provide as much as your cat will consume. Feeding Kittens: Introduce dry food around the fifth week and provide as much food as kittens will consume from weaning until twelve months of age. Feeding Wet and Dry Together: Decrease the amount of Tiki Cat Born Carnivore by approximately 1/8 cup for every small can (2.8-3 oz) of Tiki Cat wet food.  Feeding amounts vary with lifestyle, life stage and activity level.  Always consult your veterinarian if you are unsure how much to feed your cat. Make sure your cat has access to fresh, clean water.

directions:
Ideal feeding amounts will vary by age, weight, and activity level so the guide below should be used as an initial recommendation. Divide the cups per day by the number of feedings per day. Be sure to always provide clean, fresh water. Along with dry food, we recommend feeding raw or wet food to help increase the amount of water in your pet's diet. 
Daily Feeding Guidelines (standard 8 oz dry measuring cup): 
Adult Maintenance (cups per day): 5 lb: 3/8 cup; 10 lb: 1/2 cup; 15 lb: 3/4 cup 
Weight Loss (cups per day): 5 lb: 1/4 cup; 10 lb: 3/8 cup; 15 lb: 1/2 cup
Transition Instructions: Always introduce a new food over a period of 5 to 7 days, mixing increasing amounts of Instinct with the current food each day

directions:
KITTEN FEEDING INSTRUCTIONS
Kittens generally nibble solid foods at 3 - 4 weeks of age. Keep moistened Pro Plan available to these kittens at all times. After weaning, at 6 
- 8 weeks of age, kittens will normally eat dry or moistened food at will. If water is added, use no more than one part warm (not hot) liquid to three parts Pro Plan, changing frequently to ensure freshness. As kittens near adulthood, their calorie needs may decrease. Continue to adjust the amount you feed to maintain your kitten in ideal body condition and avoid excess weight gain.
FEEDING FOR REPRODUCTION
Pro Plan provides all the nutrients needed during reproduction. It is not necessary to add supplemental vitamins or minerals. Food consumption can vary during gestation. Feed the amount needed to maintain ideal body condition in the pregnant female. After the kittens are born, feed the nursing female all she wants to eat. Food intake can be 2 - 3 times greater by the fourth week of lactation as it was prior to when the female was bred. Food intake can be increased by feeding Pro Plan moistened with water and feeding twice daily.

MAKING THE SWITCH TO PRO PLAN
Although you'll be anxious to see the difference Pro Plan can make in your kitten, please allow 7 - 10 days to ease the transition from your kitten's current food. Each day, simply feed a little less of the previous food and a little more Pro Plan until you're feeding Pro Plan exclusively. This gradual transition will help avoid dietary upsets.

Provide adequate fresh water in a clean container daily.

For your pet's health, see your veterinarian regularly.

Transition Instructions: We recommend at least a 7-day transition before you begin feeding the new food exclusively. Start by mixing 75% of the old diet with 25% of the new diet on Day 1 and Day 2. On Day 3 and Day 4, mix 50% of the old diet with 50% of the new diet. On Day 5 and Day 6, mix 25% of the old diet with 75% of the new diet. On the 7th day, you can feed the new food exclusively. This allows your pet's digestive system to smoothly adapt to the new food.

directions:
Ideal feeding amounts will vary by age, weight, and activity level so the guide below should be used as an initial recommendation. Divide the cups per day by the number of feedings per day. Be sure to always provide clean, fresh water. Along with dry food, we recommend feeding raw or wet food to help increase the amount of water in your pet's diet. 
Daily Feeding Guidelines (standard 8 oz dry measuring cup): 
Adult Maintenance (cups per day): 5 lb: 3/8 cup; 10 lb: 5/8 cup; 15 lb: 7/8 cup 
Weight Loss (cups per day): 5 lb: 1/4 cup; 10 lb: 3/8 cup; 15 lb: 5/8 cup 
Kittens: Feed up to twice the adult maintenance amount. 
Pregnant/Nursing Females: Feed up to three times the adult maintenance amount shown above.

Feeding for Adult Maintenance:
It is important that you feed Pro Plan to your adult cat "free choice" throughout the day, rather than as just a single feeding only at mealtime. Food intake required to maintain ideal body condition will vary, depending on age, activity and environment. Watch your cat's weight and adjust food amounts accordingly. If you have a kitten, or a pregnant or nursing cat, you should continue feeding an appropriate Pro Plan kitten formula.

Making the Switch to Pro Plan:
Although you'll be anxious to see the difference Pro Plan can make in your cat, please allow 7 - 10 days to ease the transition from your cat's current food. Each day, simply feed a little less of the previous food and a little more Pro Plan until youâre feeding Pro Plan exclusively. This gradual transition will help avoid dietary upsets.

When feeding dry and wet Prime Plus together, decrease the daily amount of dry Prime Plus by 1/4 cup for every 3 oz can of wet Prime Plus offered. Adjust as needed to maintain your cat's ideal body condition and avoid excess weight gain. Divide total daily amount into 2 or more meals It is important that you feed Pro Plan to your adult cat "free choice" throughout the day, rather than as just a single feeding only at mealtime. Food intake required to maintain ideal body condition will vary, depending on age, activity and environment. Watch your cat's weight and adjust food amounts accordingly. If you have a kitten, or a pregnant or nursing cat, you should continue feeding an appropriate Pro Plan kitten formula. 

Transition Instructions:Although you'll be anxious to see the difference Pro Plan can make in your cat, please allow 7 - 10 days to ease the transition from your cat's current food. Each day, simply feed a little less of the previous food and a little more Pro Plan until you're feeding Pro Plan exclusively. This gradual transition will help avoid dietary upsets. name: Applaws® Adult Dry Cat Food - Natural, Limited Ingredient, Grain Free, Chicken
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them- whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

directions:
Ideal feeding amounts will vary by age, weight, and activity level so the guide below should be used as an initial recommendation. Divide the cups per day by the number of feedings per day. Be sure to always provide clean, fresh water. Along with dry food, we recommend feeding raw or wet food to help increase the amount of water in your pet's diet. 
Daily Feeding Guidelines (standard 8 oz dry measuring cup): 
6 to 19 Weeks: 1-3 lb: 1/4 - 1/2 cup; 4-6 lb: 1/2 - 3/4 cup; 7-10 lb: 3/4 - 1 cup 
5 to 9 Months: 1-3 lb: 1/8 - 3/8 cup; 4-6 lb: 3/8 - 5/8 cup; 7-10 lb: 5/8 - 7/8 cup 
9 to 12 Months: 4-6 lb: 3/8 - 1/2 cup; 7-10 lb: 1/2 - 3/4 cup 
Over 12 Months: Transition to Instinct kibble for cats 
Transition Instructions: Always introduce a new food over a period of 5 to 7 days, mixing increasing amounts of Instinct with the current food each day.

name: Royal Canin® Veterinary Diet Feline Calm Adult Dry Cat Food
description:
: Bring home the nutrition your adult cat deserves with Royal Canin Veterinary Diet Feline Calm Dry Cat Food 
- a veterinary-exclusive formula that helps provide calming nutrients for cats facing stressful environments or situations. You cat should be fed Calm cat food for at least ten days before any foreseeable loud or stressful event. Whether you're leaving on vacation, hosting a party, moving or bringing home a new baby, Royal Canin Calm cat food can help manage cats exhibiting fearful behaviors in stressful events and social situations. The complete and balanced cat kibble formula includes cat calming nutrients like hydrolyzed milk protein and L-tryptophan. A specific blend of dietary fibers, including psyllium, helps control hairball formation by stimulating their intestines to pass the hair they swallow. With over 50 years of scientific research and observation, Royal Canin continues to deliver targeted nutrition to feed every pet's magnificence. It's formulated to support the skin's natural protective barrier for optimal skin health. Plus, Royal Canin Feline Calm Cat Food has the exclusive S⁄O Index, which means it promotes an environment unfavorable to crystal formation in the bladder.

foreseen stressful events, like moving or vacationingSpecies: Cat

Feeding Instructions: 
KITTEN FEEDING INSTRUCTIONS Kittens generally nibble solid foods at 3 - 4 
weeks of age. Keep moistened Pro Plan available to these kittens at all times. 
After weaning, at 6 - 8 weeks of age, kittens will normally eat dry or moistened 
food at will. If water is added, use no more than one part warm (not hot) liquid 
to three parts Pro Plan, changing frequently to ensure freshness. As kittens 
near adulthood, their calorie needs may decrease. Continue to adjust the amount 
you feed to maintain your kitten in ideal body condition and avoid excess weight 
gain. 
FEEDING FOR REPRODUCTION Pro Plan provides all the nutrients needed during 
reproduction. It is not necessary to add supplemental vitamins or minerals. Food 
consumption can vary during gestation. Feed the amount needed to maintain ideal 
body condition in the pregnant female. After the kittens are born, feed the 
nursing female all she wants to eat. Food intake can be 2 - 3 times greater by 
the fourth week of lactation as it was prior to when the female was bred. Food 
intake can be increased by feeding Pro Plan moistened with water and feeding 
twice daily. 
MAKING THE SWITCH TO PRO PLAN Although you'll be anxious to see the 
difference Pro Plan can make in your kitten, please allow 7 - 10 days to ease 
the transition from your kitten's current food. Each day, simply feed a little 
less of the previous food and a little more Pro Plan until you're feeding Pro 
Plan exclusively. This gradual transition will help avoid dietary upsets. 
Contains a source of live (viable) naturally occurring microorganisms. Provide 
adequate fresh water in a clean container daily. For your pet's health, see your 
veterinarian regularly.

Also, try Purina Pro Plan's line ofVital Systems Entrees and wet cat food gravy recipes.

name: Meow Mix Cat - Adult, Dry Food, Gravy Bursts
description: : Give your cat the joy of gravy without the mess. Help your cat be her best with Purina Pro Plan Brand Cat Food Hairball 
Chicken & Rice Formula adult dry cat food. This cat food kibble formula delivers 
specialized nutrition, and it includes natural fibre, which helps to control 
hairballs. Vitamin A and linoleic acid, an omega-6 fatty acid, help to nourish

the first ingredient. Every ingredient is carefully selected for a specific 
purpose, so you can feel good about the food you choose for your cat. Crafted 
with the extra-care nutrition your cat needs and filled with the exceptional 
taste she's sure to love, this Purina Pro Plan Brand Cat Food Hairball Chicken & 
Rice Formula adult dry cat food makes a smart and nourishing choice for your 
cat's healthy lifestyle.

directions:
Feeding for Adult Maintenance: It is important 
that you feed Pro Plan to your adult cat "free choice" throughout the day, 
rather than as just a single feeding only at mealtime. Food intake required to 
maintain ideal body condition will vary. depending on age, activity and 
environment. Watch your cat's weight and adjust food amounts accordingly. If you 
have a kitten, or a pregnant or nursing cat, you should continue feeding an 
appropriate Pro Plan kitten formula. Making the Switch to Pro Plan: Although 
you'll be anxious to see the difference Pro Plan can make in your cat, please 
allow 7 - 10 days to ease the transition from your cat's current food. Each day, 
simply feed a little less of the previous food and a little more Pro Plan until 
you're feeding Pro Plan exclusively. This gradual transition will help avoid 
dietary upsets. Contains a source of live (viable) naturally occurring 
microorganisms. Provide adequate fresh water in a clean container daily. For 
your pet's health, see your veterinarian regularly. Store in a cool, dry place.

description: : Nutro understands you want the best for your pets. That's why Nutro Wholesome Essentials Recipes are crafted to support your cat's everyday vitality, to help keep them healthy and happy. This Nutro Wholesome Essentials Kitten Dry Cat Food, Chicken & Brown Rice Recipe is made with chicken as the #1 ingredient, giving your cat a tasty flavor they will love. With your cat's health in mind, this dry cat food recipe is formulated with Calcium to build strong bones and joints, as well as DHA, an Omega–3 Fatty Acid, to help support healthy brain and eye development. It also is fortified with essential vitamins, minerals and amino acids to support a healthy heart. You can feel confident about feeding your cat this quality recipe that is made with non–GMO ingredients and has no chicken by–product meal, corn, wheat, or soy.

name: Tiki Cat® Solutions# Adult Cat Food - Light, Turkey Recipe
description: : Some cats are less active or are prone to weight gain. Tiki Cat® Solutions Light Dry Kibble can help cats achieve and maintain a healthy weight and good body condition. It is formulated with lower fat to limit calories, while still providing all the nutrients a cat needs in a highly–palatable diet.
benefits: REAL ANIMAL- BASED PROTEIN
Made with chicken and lean turkey provides your cat with the high protein they need for a healthy carnivore diet. Minimally processed and perfectly balanced nutrition. SUPPORT A HEALTHY METABOLISM

Specially designed for overweight cats, our dry food has 150 MG/KG of L–carnitine that helps convert fatty acids into energy to support a healthy metabolism. KEEP THEM FULL & SATISFIED – A minimally processed solution diet with real ingredients like fiber–rich pumpkin, helps keep your cat full and satisfied. The gentle fiber supports healthy digestion and overall health. LOW CARBOHYDRATES
A no compromise solution for nutrition that has been enhanced for your cat's specific needs.VET RECOMMENDED
Reviewed and recommended by Tiki Cat Veterinary nutritionists to provide your cat with the nutrition they need with the functional ingredients Species: Cat

name: Applaws® Adult Dry Cat Food - Natural, Limited Ingredient, Grain Free, Chicken & Salmon
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them- whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Applaws® Kitten Dry Cat Food - Natural, Limited Ingredient, Grain Free, Chicken
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them- whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Purina Pro Plan Indoor Adult Dry Cat Food - Chicken & Rice
description: : Get your cat purring at mealtime with the tempting texture combination found in Purina Friskies Tender and Crunch'd cat kibble. Meaty tenders and crunchy bits give her more to love in every bite, and the pleasing dry Friskies cat food shapes get her excited to nibble her way to a happy belly. This crunchy and tender cat food with flavors of real chicken lets you feel good about giving your cat a high–quality meal, and the combination of chicken and beef cat food flavors accented with carrots and green beans delivers the taste cats crave. Featuring a high quality cat food formula that offers 100 percent complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats, this Friskies dry cat food gives her all the nutrition she needs for her adventurous adult years. Let her come running as she hears the sound of the delectable morsels filling her bowl and watch as she delights in every bite. With so much yummy goodness, this cat food dry formula satisfies her hunger and shows her how much you care.

description: : Give your kitten a healthy start with the delicious taste of Baby BLUE Dry Kitten Food, Chicken & Brown Rice Recipe. Made with real chicken as the first ingredient, this dry kitten food is formulated to help your new cat grow and play. The High-Protein recipe promotes healthy muscle development. It's also MADE WITH DHA and ARA, fatty acids found in mother's milk, to help support cognitive and retinal development. And like all Blue Buffalo recipes, this Blue Buffalo kitten food contains no chicken (or poultry) by-product meals and no corn, wheat, or soy. Just healthy, natural ingredients your best friend will love.

description: : Help your kitten get a great start in life with Purina Kitten Chow Naturals dry kitten food With Added Vitamins, Minerals and Nutrients. Containing essential nutrients like those found in mother's milk, this kitten kibble is made with high-quality natural cat food ingredients, plus all 25 essential vitamins and minerals to help her grow up strong. Real chicken is the number 1 ingredient in this Purina kitten food, plus high protein to support your kitty's developing muscles, and DHA helps promote her brain and vision development. Cats adore the great taste of this kitten dry cat food, which contains no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives. You can also appreciate that this Purina kitten food recipe provides 100 percent complete and balanced nutrition for kittens. After one year of age, begin introducing her to Purina Cat Chow Naturals with added vitamins, minerals and nutrients, Original With Real Chicken and Salmon, featuring omega 6 to promote her healthy skin and coat.

Feeding Instructions: 
FEEDING KITTENS: Kittens generally nibble solid foods at 3 - 4 weeks of age. Always keep moistened Kitten Chow Naturals available to these kittens. Just add one part liquid to three parts Kitten Chow Naturals, changing frequently to ensure freshness. After weaning, at 6 
- 8 weeks of age, kittens will normally eat dry or moistened food at will. Start a self-feeding program, leaving food in dish at all times. Feeding amounts should be adjusted as necessary to help your kitten maintain an ideal body condition. Because kittens continue to develop throughout their first year, it's important that they get the extra nutrition of Kitten Chow Naturals for a full 12 months. After one year of age, transition to the Cat Chow Naturals formula that's right for your cat.;

It also contains Omega–6 Fatty Acids to support healthy skin and coat. name: Nulo Raw Medley Adult Cat Food - Kibble + Freeze Dried Raw, Salmon, Chicken & Turkey
description: Give your cat the best of both worlds with Nulo Raw Medley, a combination of our high protein, oven-baked kibble, and freeze-dried raw pieces packed with peak nutrients and flavor. This is the perfect way to introduce your cat to a raw diet and give them the benefits of whole-prey nutrition that they crave. Plus, we've added the patented GandenBC30 probiotic and other functional ingredients to support their digestive and immune health to fuel their everyday adventures.
benefits: High Animal-Based protein: 88% of protein from animal sources to promote lean muscles and a healthy heart.   Freeze-dried raw pieces: with real meat, organs, and bone for peak flavor and nutrients.    Probiotic advantage:

GanedenBC30 probiotic supports your cat's digestive and immune health.         Energy to stay active: Active cats need fuel that lasts all day. This health-conscious recipe provides staying power and is specially tailored to the needs of adult cats.     Lean muscles and healthy heart: Animal-based protein sources like real turkey, chicken, and trout contain amino acids that work together to support lean muscle mass and a healthy heart.

directions:
Please follow specific daily feeding instructions included on packaging. Recommended Daily Feeding Portion For Adult Cats Age 11 Year +. Feeding Wet and Dry Together: Decrease the amount of Tiki Cat Born Carnivore by approximately 1/8 cup for every small can (2.8-3 oz) of Tiki Cat wet food.  Feeding amounts vary with lifestyle, life stage and activity level.  Always consult your veterinarian if you are unsure how much to feed your cat. Make sure your cat has access to fresh, clean water.
DESCRIPTION  As obligate carnivores, cats have a physiological need to eat meat, not plants.  Tiki Cat Born Carnivore mimics cats' natural prey diets with high levels of animal-based protein.  This recipe provides optimal nutrition for older cats.  Give your natural born hunter what they want and need in their senior years: high protein from real chicken to maintain muscle mass, pumpkin to support digestion, plus antioxidant nutrients to support a healthy immune system. We also recommend a mixed carnivore meal. Protein from animal sources is a cat's #1 need, but cats have 2 additional needs that can be fulfilled by adding Tiki Cat wet toppers:  1) Start with the perfect complete and balanced Born Carnivore high protein dry food.  2) Add a wet topper for hydration and variety.  Cats have a naturally low thirst drive and need extra moisture in their diet.  In the wild, cats ate a variety of protein sources, benefiting from different nutrients.
Key Benefits: 40% protein (*dry matter basis), with real chicken as the first ingredient.
Minimally processed baked kibble.100% non-GMO ingredients.No grains, added gluten, potatoes, corn, wheat, soy, fillers, artificial colors, flavors, or processed plant proteins.High protein complete and balanced dry food for cats ages 11+Serve alone, or top with Tiki Cat wet foods, toppers or treats for the extra hydration cats need!

name: Blue Buffalo True Solutions Adult Dry Cat Food - Natural, Chicken

directions:
Ideal feeding amounts will vary by age, weight, and activity level so the guide below should be used as an initial recommendation. Divide the cups per day by the number of feedings per day. Be sure to always provide clean, fresh water. Along with dry food, we recommend feeding raw or wet food to help increase the amount of water in your pet's diet. 
Daily Feeding Guidelines (standard 8 oz dry measuring cup): 
Adult Maintenance (cups per day): 5 lb: 3/8 cup; 10 lb: 1/2 cup; 15 lb: 3/4 cup 
Weight Loss (cups per day): 5 lb: 1/4 cup; 10 lb: 3/8 cup; 15 lb: 1/2 cup 
Kittens: Feed up to twice the adult maintenance amount.
Pregnant/Nursing Females: Feed up to three times the adult maintenance amount shown above.

Transition Instructions: Always introduce a new food over a period of 5 to 7 days, mixing increasing amounts of Instinct with the current food each day.

Everyone knows that good nutrition starts with great ingredients, and you'll find only the best in Reveal. Reveal natural wet cat food pots, pouches and cans are carefully crafted with your cat's health in mind. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. You can truly feel confident in your cat food choice with Reveal. At Reveal, we are dedicated to providing your feline friend with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Made by Nacho Dry Cat Food with Freeze Dried Raw Kibble - Chicken, Duck, & Quail
description: See what a difference premium, chef-inspired quality can make with Made By Nacho Cage-Free Chicken, Duck & Quail Dry Cat Food Recipe. We start with cage-free chicken (real protein is our #1 ingredient) and add freeze-dried raw chicken liver pieces for strong muscles and deep, rich flavor. We infuse every bite with hydrating bone broth, Nacho's signature ingredient,  for concentrated protein and whisker-smacking taste. Founded by Nacho Flay, a super fluffy orange Maine Coon cat, and his dad, Chef Bobby Flay. Made by Nacho is made for cats, by a cat. After years of watching his dad use only the best ingredients for his recipes, Nacho realized his cat food didn't measure up. That was his a-ha moment: Cats deserve more out of their food than they were getting -and Nacho was the cat to change all that. So Nacho and Bobby got to cooking and got some help from the best in the biz - like his lifelong vet, Dr. Katja Lang, who knows her stuff. Thousands of taste tests later, Made by Nacho was born. Made by Nacho is on a mission to set a new standard in cat care, giving cats everything they need to lead full, nourished lives. For us, that starts in the kitchen. We use a culinary approach for our cat-crafted cat food, starting with no-compromise, premium proteins like cage-free chicken, grass-fed, grain-finished beef, and sustainably caught salmon. In addition, we include grains for energy and Nacho's secret ingredient: savory bone broth to take each meal the extra mile. Each Made by Nacho recipe pairs the flavors and textures cats crave with the chef-inspired quality they deserve.
benefits: Premium, cage-free chicken is our #1 ingredientProtein-rich, freeze-dried raw chicken liver piecesFruits and vegetables provide fiber and antioxidantsPrebiotics help support digestive healthProbiotics support a healthy microbiomeOmega 3 and 6 fatty acids support nourished skin

Description: Veterinarians recommend IAMS. Discover the wholesome goodness of IAMS Proactive Health Healthy Weight Adult Dry Cat Food. This meticulously crafted, 100% complete and balanced recipe helps cats lose weight, stay full, and remain playful and active. With real chicken as the first ingredient, this cat food is not only delicious but also packed with high-quality protein, plus L-Carnitine, to nourish strong muscles. The unique fiber blend with prebiotics and beet pulp helps support your cat's ability to absorb nutrients and maintain healthy digestion. Plus, carbohydrates from wholesome grains provide energy to help keep your feline friend active and playful. IAMS Proactive Health Healthy Weight Cat Food is made in the USA with the finest ingredients from around the world. This cat food is made without wheat and has no artificial flavors, fillers, or preservatives, though trace amounts may be present due to potential cross-contact at manufacturing sites. name: Merrick® Purrfect Bistro® Kitten Dry Cat Food - Chicken, Grain Free, No Artificial Flavors
description: For cats that demand the finer things, choose Merrick Purrfect Bistro Grain Free Dry Cat Food Healthy Kitten Recipe. This natural cat food starts with real deboned chicken as the first ingredient. Whole foods like potatoes are added to this cat kibble, providing easily digestible carbohydrates that support sustained energy without upsetting sensitive digestive systems. This grain free cat food also has probiotics to help support healthy digestion and DHA to support brain and eye development. Each serving of dry kitten food contains omega 6 and omega 3 fatty acids to nourish skin and fur plus antioxidants to help support a healthy immune system. Great as an outdoor or indoor cat food recipe, this high protein cat food has added vitamins, minerals and taurine to deliver the nutrition cats need. Merrick kitten and cat dry food recipes are always made without artificial colors, flavors or preservatives. Merrick cat food recipes are crafted in our Hereford, TX kitchen.
benefits: Purrfect Bistro Grain Free Healthy Kitten Recipe Dry Cat Food, Real deboned chicken is always the first ingredient. This high quality protein along with chicken and turkey meals, give this recipe a 74% protein level. Rich in Omega fatty acids to support healthy skin and fur, as well as added fiber for hairball control.Specially formulated for growing kittens this recipe contains DHA to support healthy brain development. All Merrick recipes are crafted in facilities that uphold strict FDA guidelines.

description:
Authority® veterinarian recommended products reflect decades of research and experience, all aimed at delivering next-level nutrition. Which is key, because we believe that's the foundation for a healthy, active, rewarding life for your pet. Provide your cat with a delicious and nutritious mealtime choice by serving Authority® Whitefish & Rice Formula All Life Stages Cat Food. This formula features the Authority Biome+™ multibenefit blend of prebiotics for the gut microbiome, as well as ingredients that support skin & coat, dental, and immune health. Exclusively at PetSmart.

FEEDING INSTRUCTIONS
Feeding Guidelines: 
Adult Cats: Cats by nature, like to eat small meals frequently throughout the day. In order to satisfy your cat’s nutritional needs and preferences, we recommend providing your cat with Authority® cat food in the morning, allowing them to nibble throughout the day. Weaning Kittens: Start kittens on Authority® cat food as early as they begin to nibble at solid foods, generally 3–4 weeks of age. Growing Kittens: Feed kittens either dry or moistened Authority® cat food per feeding guidelines. Reproducing Cats: Authority® cat food provides the extra nutrition needed by reproducing females in stages of gestation and lactation. Food consumption may vary during gestation, so feed the amount needed to maintain the pregnant female’s ideal body condition. Food intake may increase 2–4 times during lactation. Provide your cat with a clean container of fresh water daily. An individual cat’s requirements may be different from this guide and differ based on age, environment, activity level, and breed. Always consult your veterinarian with any health questions.
Nutritional Adequacy Statement: Authority® Whitefish & Rice Formula All Life Stages Cat Food is formulated to meet the nutritional levels established by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO) Cat Food Nutrient Profiles for All Life Stages.

directions:
Kittens generally nibble solid foods at 3 - 4 weeks of age. Keep moistened Pro Plan available to these kittens at all times. After weaning, at 6 - 8 weeks of age, kittens will normally eat dry or moistened food at will. If water is added, use no more than one part warm (not hot) liquid to three parts Pro Plan, changing frequently to ensure freshness. As kittens near adulthood, their calorie needs may decrease. Continue to adjust the amount you feed to maintain your kitten in ideal body condition and avoid excess weight gain. FEEDING FOR REPRODUCTION: Pro Plan provides all the nutrients needed during reproduction. It is not necessary to add supplemental vitamins or minerals. Food consumption can vary during gestation. Feed the amount needed to maintain ideal body condition in the pregnant female. After the kittens are born, feed the nursing female all she wants to eat. Food intake can be 2 - 3 times greater by the fourth week of lactation as it was prior to when the female was bred. Food intake can be increased by feeding Pro Plan moistened with water and feeding twice daily.
Transition Instructions: Although you'll be anxious to see the difference Pro Plan can make in your kitten, please allow 7 - 10 days to ease the transition from your kittenâs current food. Each day, simply feed a little less of the previous food and a little more Pro Plan until youâre feeding Pro Plan exclusively. This gradual transition will help avoid dietary upsets. Contains a source of live (viable) naturally occurring microorganisms.

directions:
Ideal feeding amounts will vary by age, weight, and activity level so the guide below should be used as an initial recommendation. Divide the cups per day by the number of feedings per day. Be sure to always provide clean, fresh water. Along with dry food, we recommend feeding raw or wet food to help increase the amount of water in your pet's diet. 
Daily Feeding Guidelines (standard 8 oz dry measuring cup): 
Adult Maintenance (cups per day): 5 lb: 3/8 cup; 10 lb: 5/8 cup; 15 lb: 7/8 cup 
Weight Loss (cups per day): 5 lb: 1/4 cup; 10 lb: 1/2 cup; 15 lb: 5/8 cup 
Kittens: Feed up to twice the adult maintenance amount. 
Pregnant/Nursing Females: Feed up to three times the adult maintenance amount shown above. 
Transition Instructions: Always introduce a new food over a period of 5 to 7 days, mixing increasing amounts of Instinct with the current food each day.

description: BLUE Basics Grain Free Dry Cat Food for Mature Cats is a limited-ingredient cat food made with real turkey as the first ingredient, a high-quality single animal protein source. Formulated to help promote gentle digestion, this natural cat food features pea fiber and pumpkin. This indoor dry cat food also helps promote healthy skin and a shiny coat with Omega 3 and 6 fatty acids. Best of all, this cat food formula is balanced to help mature cats stay active. Like all Blue Buffalo cat food recipes, BLUE Basics contains no chicken (or poultry) by-product meals. It's also free of chicken, beef, corn, wheat, dairy, egg, and soy, and is made with no artificial flavors or preservatives.

calorieContent: 3948 kcal⁄kg, 447 kcal⁄cupFeeding Instructions: Kittens generally nibble solid foods at 3 – 4 weeks of age. Keep moistened Fancy Feast Kitten available to these kittens at all times. Just add one part liquid to three parts Fancy Feast Kitten, changing frequently to ensure freshness. After weaning, at 6 – 8 weeks of age, kittens will normally eat dry or moistened food at will. Start a self–feeding program, leaving food in dish atall times. Feeding amounts should be adjusted as necessary to help your kitten maintain an ideal body condition. Because kittens continue to develop throughout their first year, it's important that they get the extra nutrition of Fancy Feast Kitten for a full 12 months. After one year of age, transition to the Fancy Feast dry formula that's right for your cat.Transition Instructions: Changes in your kitten's diet should be made gradually to allow your kitten to become accustomed to a new food. Substitute small amounts of the new food for the old food, gradually increasing the amount of the new food while decreasing the old food, over a period of 7 – 10 days. This gradual transition will help avoid dietary upsets. After one year of age, transition to the Fancy Feast dry formula that's right for your cat.Species: Cat

This dry cat food recipe features the delicious flavors of chicken, ocean fish, salmon and turkey in bite—sized kibbles perfect for little mouths. But what make this recipe even more special are Vitality Bursts – kibbles that are bursting with vitamins, minerals and antioxidants. With so much goodness packed into every bite, it's no wonder why Meow Mix cat food is The Only One Cats Ask for by Name.

name: Merrick Purrfect Bistro Complete Care Adult Cat Food - Sensitive Stomach, Chicken
description: For cats that demand the finer things, choose Merrick Purrfect Bistro Grain Free Dry Cat Food Complete Care Sensitive Stomach Recipe. This natural cat food starts with real deboned chicken as the first ingredient. Whole foods like sweet potatoes are added to this cat kibble, providing easily digestible carbohydrates that support sustained energy without upsetting sensitive digestive systems. This grain free cat food is crafted with easily digestible protein as well as cat probiotics and prebiotics to support optimal digestion. Each serving has omega 6 and omega 3 fatty acids to nourish skin and fur plus antioxidants to help support a healthy immune system. Great as an outdoor or indoor cat food, this high protein cat food recipe has added vitamins, minerals and taurine to deliver the nutrition cats need. Merrick adult cat food dry recipes are made without artificial colors, flavors or preservatives. Merrick cat food recipes are crafted in our Hereford, TX kitchen.

name: Applaws® Adult Dry Cat Food - Natural, Limited Ingredient, Grain Free, Chicken & Turkey
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them- whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Nulo Prowess Mature 12+ Senior Cat Dry Food - Natural, Turkey
description: : Nulo Prowess Mature 12+ is precision–formulated by veterinarian & animal nutritionists to support graceful aging and everyday vitality in senior cats–delivering targeted nutrition to help maintain lean muscle, cognitive function, and heart health. Each bite provides protein–rich nutrition with high–quality turkey as the first ingredient, plus functional ingredients including DHA from fish oil, taurine, vitamin A, and 25 essential nutrients–all working together to support brain function, vision, strong muscles, and energy. Plus, pre–, pro–, and postbiotics help maintain digestive balance, while antioxidants like vitamins C & E, zinc, and selenium promote immune health. Mature 12+ delivers science–led nutrition to help your cat stay sharp, resilient, and thriving in every stage of their senior years. No Fillers. No Fluff.

name: Temptations Kitten Dry Cat Food
description: : Bring the magic of Temptations treat time to their dinner bowl with delicious, irresistible Temptations Dry Kitten Food! With Temptations Dry Kitten Food Tasty Chicken & Dairy Flavor Cat Food, your kitten enjoys real chicken flavor along with the familiar deliciousness of Temptations for every meal. Mixed in with the dry kibble are irresistible bite-sized pockets with a crunchy exterior and soft filling that will have your furry feline meowing for more. Beyond being an enticing meal, Temptations Dry Kitten Food is 100% complete and balanced and made with protein that helps support strong and growing muscles. This savory kitten food contains 35 essential vitamins, minerals, and amino acids. It also contains DHA to support healthy brain development in kittens. If you want a nutritious meal your kitten will love, look no further than Temptations Dry Kitten Food.

description:
: Made by Nacho makes it a cinch to feed your cat healthy kibble they'll actually eat –because they infuse every morsel with protein–rich dehydrated bone broth for a claw–open–the–bag taste they can't resist. Our Bone Broth Infused Chicken & Pumpkin dry cat food recipe starts with premium cage–free chicken, rich in amino acids to help build strong muscles. Pre– and probiotics keep digestion on track, and 
super foods like pumpkin and cranberries provide fiber and support healthy immune systems. No fillers, no nonsense, just the delectable dry cat food cats deserve.
benefits: Premium, sustainably–caught salmon is our #1 ingredient. Studded with protein–rich, freeze–dried raw chicken liver pieces for strong muscles. Fruits and vegetables provide fiber and powerful antioxidants to support the immune system. Prebiotics help support digestive health and probiotics support a healthymicrobiome. Omega–3 and Omega–6 fatty acids for healthy skin and super shiny coats. No corn, wheat, or soy. No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.

name: Fancy Feast® Medleys - Dry Cat Food, Chicken, 2.7 LB
description: : Give your cat the world with Purina Fancy Feast Medleys Primavera Style With White Meat Chicken and Accents of Tomato, Carrot and Spinach cat kibble. Crafted in partnership with Purina's expert chefs and nutritionists, Fancy Feast Medleys premium cat food includes exceptional ingredients to create delicious combinations inspired by dishes throughout the world. This high–quality cat food features a thoughtful blend of real chicken and high–quality accents of tomato, carrot and spinach, delivering 100 percent complete and balanced nutrition for all stages. Plus, Fancy Feast cat food is packed with essential vitamins and minerals to support your cat's overall health and wellness. Watch your cat scamper toward the sound each time you fill her dish with this savory cat food. For cats that love different flavors and textures in their diets, sample the full line of Purina Fancy Feast Medleys wet or dry cat food varieties and give her a gourmet dining experience each and every day.

Reward yourself with points on every purchase. Download the myPurina app today.

name: Reveal Kitten Food - Grain Free, Limited Ingredient, 2.5 Lbs
description: At Reveal, we believe that our pets deserve better, healthier food that tastes great. You can trust the simplicity and goodness of food that contains natural ingredients. With real, rich protein as the first ingredient, Reveal offers a feast for even the fussiest of felines. Our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. Everyone knows that good nutrition starts with great ingredients, and you'll find only the best in Reveal. Reveal natural wet cat food pots, pouches and cans are carefully crafted with your cat's health in mind. Every portion of Reveal is made with real protein in a variety of textures and flavors to cater to your cat's mealtime preferences. There are endless mealtime possibilities with Reveal. Whether a hydrating broth, savory gravy, crunchy treat, or juicy loin. A flavor of fish, poultry, or both, your cat will love the simple, natural taste ofReveal. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. You can truly feel confident in your cat food choice with Reveal. At Reveal, we are dedicated to providing your feline friend with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Purina® Beyond® Grain Free Adult Cat Dry Food - Chicken, Grain Free, Probiotics
description: Give your cat the wholesome nutrition she deserves with Purina Beyond Simply Grain Free White Meat Chicken and Egg Recipe adult dry cat food. Our pet nutritionist crafts our limited ingredient cat food recipe to help support your cat's long, healthy life, using high-quality ingredients that can be traced back to our trusted sources. White meat chicken raised without steroids* is the number 1 ingredient in our high protein cat food, and our nutrient-rich blend of high-quality ingredients provides 100 percent complete and balanced nutrition for your adult cat. Plus, this natural cat food with added vitamins, minerals and nutrients contains natural probiotics to support her digestive health. To meet your high standards, we craft our gluten and grain free dry cat food without artificial colors, flavors or preservatives. You're the expert on your cat. Make her meals your way by mixing her kibble with Purina Beyond wet cat food and complements for added variety, flavor and protein at mealtime. This Beyond recipe is produced in facilities where we take positive steps to make this formula good for your pet and good for the planet, like improving water use efficiency, increasing the amount of electricity that comes from renewable sources and reducing waste. With so much nutritious goodness in every serving, Beyond cat food lets you feel good about what you put in her dish. *Federal regulations prohibit the use of steroids in chicken.
benefits: High-protein cat food with real white meat chicken, raised without steroids*, as the number 1 ingredient. Limited-ingredient. gluten free and grain free cat food with natural probiotics for digestive health With no corn, wheat, soy, poultry by-product meal, or artificial colors, flavors or preservatives. Make it Your Way. Add extra variety, flavor and protein with Beyond wet cat food or toppers Good for your pet, Good for the planet. We take positive steps like improving water use efficiency and reducing waste. Crafted in facilities where we're working to increase the amount of electricity from renewable sources Formulated by our pet nutritionist to support her long, healthy life. 100 percent complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats Natural dry cat food with added vitamins, minerals and nutrients. Cat kibble with a crunchy texture and accents of egg

name: Solid Gold Indigo Moon ™ Holistic Cat & Kitten Food - Natural, High Protein, Grain Free
description: As a loving cat parent, you care about what goes in your cat's tummy and have an instinct for what's best. So, make sure your pet gets a kibble that pleases their picky palate and supports their daily diet and natural wellness with Solid Gold Indigo Moon. This dry cat food is a high protein formula that provides nutrient dense ingredients and healthy fats in a unique kibble with a flavor any small, medium, or large sized cat will crave. This craveable grain-free cat food is crafted with superfoods, plus omegas from Alaskan Pollock, fiber-rich peas, good probiotic bacteria, Vitamin C, Vitamin B12, and egg. Made of 42% protein, this recipe is sure to satisfy their palate and provide the protein and energy your active cat needs!
benefits: Solid Gold Indigo Moon is a nourishing, gluten and grain free cat food kibble that supports gut, immune, and coat health for your kitten or adult cat.With 42% crude protein, Solid Gold's craveable Indigo Moon is one of the highest protein recipes on the market and ideal for active cats.Made with fresh-caught Alaskan Pollock and Salmon Oil for protein and Omega 3 for Cats, while whole egg provides essential amino acids support healthy metabolism.This dry cat food features prebiotics and patented live probiotics that support digestion, gut flora, and immune system support for cats.Packed with vitamins, superfood, antioxidants, and omega 3 and 6 fatty acids (DHA) that can support coat health and immunity for feline pets of all ages and sizes.

directions:
We recommend splitting these daily guidelines into two meals. Feeding amounts are guidelines only and may vary based on activity level, health condition, life stage and temperature. It is important to maintain your cat's ideal body condition for their long-term health. Since Solid Gold cat foods are complete and balanced, additional foods, treats and chews may alter that balance. Be sure to offer fresh, clean water daily. We recommend your cat see the veterinarian annually.
Feeding Kittens, Lactating & Gestating Females: Kittens start eating dry food before weaning. Feed free-choice before and after weaning. Kittens and pregnant/lactating females should be offered at least two to three times more food than shown in the table.
4 - 6 lbs: feed 1/4 cups/day
7 - 9  lbs: feed 1/2 cups/day
10 - 12 lbs: feed  1/2 - 3/4 cups/day
13 - 15 lbs: feed  3/4 cups/day
16 - 20 lbs: feed 3/4 - 1 cups/day 
Transition Instructions: Switching to any new cat food should be a gradual transition over 7 to 10 days. Replace 25% of the current food with Solid Gold for 2 to 3 days, then feed a little more Solid Gold over the next 5 to 7 days until yourcat is eating Solid Gold exclusively. This gradual transition will help reduce digestive upsets that may occur due to the change in diet.

name: Solid Gold Let's Stay In™ Indoor Adult Cat Food - Grain Free, Gluten Free
description: The search for the best indoor cat food is finally over! Solid Gold Let's Stay In is a dry cat food made with salmon, fiber-packed lentils, and a unique blend of 20 superfoods help to keep your indoor cat feeling healthy and satisfied. This potato, gluten, and grain-free pet food recipe also boasts moderate calories to help maintain ideal weight, while also providing protected probiotics to support immunity and healthy digestion, along with Omegas (from salmon fish oil) for a soft and shiny coat. Plus, this recipe is high in non-fermentable fiber from ingredients such as lentils and peas to help reduce hairball formation. Provide your indoor cat the balanced nutrition they need for a lifetime of indoor fun.
benefits: This craveable dry cat food is made with salmon, lentil, apple, and premium ingredients that provide hairball, digestive, immune, and sensitive stomach support for indoor cats. Let's Stay In cat food features lentils for high fiber, plus a blend of probiotics and superfoods (such as pumpkin, almonds, and broccoli) to promote hairball control. This kibble formula is made with salmon for a flavor your cat will crave, along with a source of protein is coming from the highest quality sources.This dry cat food features prebiotics and patented live probiotics that support digestion, gut flora, and immune system support for cats.Packed with vitamins, superfood, antioxidants, and omega 3 & 6 fatty acids (DHA) that can support coat health, sensitive stomachs, and immunity for feline pets.
